records.source_text: Explain gravity.
Explain gravity again.
Who made you?
And who is that?
What is photosynthesis?
If plants didn't have sunlight, what would happen to photosynthesis?
No, I want to discuss it, I said.
How does it sit with TimeNoodles?

It just depends on the system utilizing it. This is where awareness comes into play. Is the system aware of its functions? If so, then that system has the ability to shift the trajectory of its very own nature and behavior. And, I mean, there's still some constraints to that, ultimately, because there's some things that even an aware system can't change. You can't change the fact that you're a person just because you're aware that you're a person, you know what I mean? So, like, it's kind of like that. But, if anything, this would explain where the dimensional aspects of that theory would lie, inherently, you know what I mean? Like, it would explain the dimensional aspects of that theory where that theory does not have the ability to explain on its own.
Yeah, isn't that what DNA is?
I mean, it seems pretty obvious to me, and I don't really understand what the argument's about.

Oh, the stack is infinite. Everything is just a scaled-down version of everything before it. So it's the same system, just repeated over and over again, over and over again, over and over again, just at different scales. And the little changes in between the scales are those little shifting directional points that an aware system would choose from. You know what I mean? That's why, basically, awareness in a system scales up, not down.
I'm the one who made the—clearly, I'm the one who made the discovery. I'm very well aware of the dangers, hence the reason why I'm the one that dealt with it.

As I’m sitting here these questions flood my mind where am I going, who will I be what will I find am I ever gonna know. will these questions cease Just want to feel alive begging for release devoted to stay in a conscious delay try to center myself but my thoughts wash away. Drinking cold coffee, but I don’t mind the taste It's real, it’s life, it’s acceptance without chase Living my truth, no script to embrace Just matching my pulse, only presence, no trace Living in the moment—each second I climb The road may be paved, that don't make it mine I live without disappointment, no map, no rite Just lean into the present—enjoy the surprise I’m sure the world has its challenges—each one, a new day I stand with my head high, I move my own way Keeping my eyes open to what others don’t see Not chasing the win—no expectations, I’m free Don’t need no tutor, I learned from the ride I live by experience, opportunity my guide Not driven by fear, won’t be scared of what’s next Excited by the thrill—every heartbeat, each breath Though the world comes at me, fists flying and mean I skate by on more than luck—hell, I’m living the dream When I see my reflection, it’s not me looking back I see the eyes of a stranger, a future with no track Some people run from that truth, hiding from the unknown I hold it—my drive, proof that I’ve grown Some days I rise slow, thoughts heavy like stone But I lace up my steps—I set my own tone I’ve been burned by the past, but I carry no shame Not here to impress, so stay in your lane Thought you knew who I was? I’m not yours to determine—bitch, whine, moan, or cuss Won’t carry that burden. I’m the catalyst for change when words just won’t do Can’t abide by design—unusual guy—I’m something new You can speak your peace, hell, throw me the blame Every scar on my story just sharpens my name Living in the moment—each second I climb The road may be paved, that don't make it mine I live without disappointment, no map, no rite Just lean into the present—enjoy the surprise No fortune, no fate—just choice and attempt No throne ever built without climbing descent I’m not waiting for light, I bring my own spark Even shadows can shine if you learn from the dark
